title: WHO Withdrawal Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
subjects: Presidents and presidential powers, Vice Presidents
crs_summary: WHO Withdrawal Act This bill requires the President to immediately withdraw the United States from the World Health Organization (WHO) and prohibits using any federal funds to provide for U.S. participation in the WHO. The bill also repeals the 1948 act authorizing the United States to join the WHO.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
